---
title: "Genetic Analysis Analysis"
output:
bookdown::html_document2:
toc: true
toc_float: true
number_sections: true
self_contained: false
pkgdown:
as_is: true
vignette: >
%\VignetteIndexEntry{Genetic Analysis Analysis}
%\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
%\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
-------------------------

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r include-vignette, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (identical(Sys.getenv("IN_PKGDOWN"), "true")) {
  cat(knitr::knit_child(
    "/home/jhz22/R/vigneetes/gaawr2.Rmd",
    quiet = TRUE
  ))
} else {
  htmltools::tags$iframe(
    src = "https://jinghuazhao.github.io/R/vignettes/gaawr2.html",
    width = "100%",
    style = "height:100vh; border:none;"
  )
}
```
